title: Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, its first publicly available Mythos-class model, with capabilities in software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. The launch includes safety systems that limit high-risk capabilities in areas like cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, described as the company's first publicly available Mythos-class model. It spans capabilities across software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. The launch pairs these capabilities with safety systems that restrict high-risk functions in cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry.
